facebook.caption:
POV: you're in Cửa Lấp and you find a bánh mì spot with 4.8 stars and 675 reviews. You almost walked past it. Don't be that person.

Bánh Mì & You is the real deal. Not the tourist strip. Not overpriced. Just a sandwich that earns its rating every single day.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
